subject: Free bonuses going away at 11:59pm...
body:
Heads up - the offer I gave everyone for free at my launch expires in about 24 hrs.

10x the value. 10x cheaper than list price (only $9/mo after 90 days for as long as you subscribe to Skool). 7x the free time to get going.

The Money Models Training + Skool specific training.

All free. Start here free: skool.com/hormozi

(48hrs left before 7x free time disappears)

Alex

PS - I want to be clear - the $100M Money Models course and audiobook are both available for free - no optin or purchase necessary - on my site and on my podcast. So if you don't want to sign up for a free trial - all good. You can still get the goods.
